hero.title: Discover Your Dream Vacation
hero.subtitle: Experience unforgettable travel journeys with Flag Global

about.shortDesc: At Flag Global, we offer unique experiences to travel enthusiasts. With years of expertise, we create personalized and unforgettable vacation plans for each of our clients.
about.story: Flag Global was founded in 2015 with an innovative vision for the tourism industry. Since our establishment, we have served thousands of happy customers and introduced Turkey's most beautiful destinations to the world. With our experienced team and extensive partner network, we offer travel solutions suitable for every budget and taste.
about.mission: Our mission is to make a difference in the tourism industry by providing personalized, reliable, and unforgettable travel experiences to each of our clients.
about.vision: Our vision is to serve at world-class standards with a sustainable tourism approach, as one of Turkey's leading tourism companies.

destinations.subtitle: Discover the most beautiful places in Turkey

items.name: Kuşadası
items.description: Gateway to ancient Ephesus, surrounded by Pigeon Island, Pamucak Beaches, Ladies Beach and National Park. A perfect blend of nature, luxury hotels, and delicious local cuisine.

items.name: Bodrum
items.description: Enchanting Bodrum with its blue-flag beaches, historic castle, and vibrant nightlife. An unforgettable vacation experience with luxury marinas and authentic stone houses.

items.name: Muğla
items.description: Where sun, blue and green intertwine. Hundreds of ancient cities and ruins shed light on 8,000 years of history, with turquoise waters and untouched coves.

items.name: İzmir
items.description: The pearl of the Aegean, enchanting with its historic Kemeraltı Bazaar, Kordon waterfront and ancient cities in surrounding districts.

items.name: Antalya
items.description: A city where sea, sun, history and nature harmonize beautifully. Atatürk described it as 'Without a doubt, the most beautiful place in the world.'

items.name: Marmaris
items.description: A stunning cruise port where the Aegean and Mediterranean meet. Perfect for sailing, diving, and exploring hidden coves along the coastline.

items.name: Alanya
items.description: The jewel of the Mediterranean with Cleopatra Beach, its historic castle and unique natural beauties. A city where historical and modern holiday concepts meet.

items.name: Istanbul
items.description: The megacity bridging two continents, blending thousands of years of history with modern life. A unique experience from Hagia Sophia to the Grand Bazaar, from the Bosphorus to the Islands.

items.name: Çanakkale
items.description: A city that leapt from the pages of history. A cultural treasure filled with the Gallipoli Peninsula, ancient city of Troy and Strait views.

items.name: Bursa
items.description: The first capital of the Ottoman Empire, adorned with a thousand shades of green at the foot of Uludağ. Famous for its historic silk road, thermal springs and İskender kebab.

items.name: Cappadocia
items.description: A fairytale world with fairy chimneys, underground cities, and hot air balloons. Cappadocia is a unique place created by nature and history together.

items.name: Ankara
items.description: The capital of the Republic of Turkey, the heart of modern Turkey with Anıtkabir and museums. A rooted city bearing traces of Anatolian civilizations.

items.name: Trabzon
items.description: The pearl of the Black Sea. The most enchanting city of the Eastern Black Sea with Sumela Monastery, plateaus and magnificent nature.

items.name: Rize
items.description: A Black Sea paradise offering an experience immersed in nature with tea gardens, lush green plateaus and zipline courses.

services.subtitle: We are here to offer you the best travel experience
services.pageSubtitle: We turn your dream vacation into reality with our professional tourism services

items.title: Package Tours
items.description: Live your dream vacation with carefully planned tour packages suitable for every budget.
items.longDesc: Explore the four corners of the world with our domestic and international tours. From culture tours to adventure tours, honeymoon packages to family tours, we offer your dream vacation with our wide range. All our tours are carried out with carefully planned programs led by experienced tour leaders.

items.title: Hotel Reservation
items.description: Accommodation opportunities at thousands of hotels worldwide with best price guarantee.
items.longDesc: We offer the most suitable accommodation options for you at the finest hotels in Turkey and around the world. From boutique hotels to 5-star resorts, apart hotels to villa rentals, accommodation solutions for every need.

items.title: Transfer Services
items.description: Comfortable and safe transfer solutions from airport transfers to city transportation.
items.longDesc: Continue your journey seamlessly with our comfortable and safe transfer services. VIP vehicles, professional drivers, and our 24/7 service approach – we are by your side at every point from airport transfers to intercity transportation.

items.title: Guide Services
items.description: Cultural and historical tours accompanied by our professional and experienced guides.
items.longDesc: Experience unforgettable cultural experiences with our licensed and experienced guides. We ensure you discover Turkey's rich history and culture in the best possible way. With our multilingual guide service, we organize special tours for guests from every nation.

items.title: Reliable Service
items.description: A trusted travel partner with years of experience and thousands of happy customers.

items.title: Affordable Prices
items.description: Vacation options that fit your budget with best price guarantee.

items.title: 24/7 Support
items.description: Professional support team by your side throughout your journey.

items.title: Personalized Planning
items.description: Customized travel programs tailored to your needs.

cta.title: Start Your Dream Vacation Today
cta.subtitle: Collect unforgettable memories with Flag Global. Contact us now.

footer.description: Flag Global is a leading travel company offering reliable and professional tourism services.

items.name: Ayşe Yılmaz
items.text: Our Cappadocia tour with Flag Global was magnificent. Everything was perfectly planned, and our guide was very knowledgeable. We will definitely choose them again!

items.name: Mehmet Kaya
items.text: We chose Flag Global for our Bodrum vacation and were very satisfied. Hotel selection, transfers, and every detail was thoughtfully arranged.

items.name: Fatma Demir
items.text: Our Antalya package tour was wonderful. The price-performance ratio was excellent. Our children had a great time too. Thank you Flag Global!

items.name: Ali Özkan
items.text: The Istanbul tour exceeded our expectations. Professional guidance and flawless organization. I recommend it to everyone.

team.subtitle: Meet our experienced and passionate team

hotels.subtitle: Comfortable accommodation at our partner hotels
hotels.pageSubtitle: Discover our partner hotels in Turkey's most beautiful destinations, especially Kuşadası and Bodrum
hotels.noResults: No hotels found matching your search.

items.name: Pine Bay Holiday Resort
items.description: One of Kuşadası's most prestigious holiday villages. An unforgettable vacation experience with private beach, aqua park and all-inclusive concept.

items.name: Korumar Hotel De Luxe
items.description: Kuşadası's iconic hotel with its position overlooking the turquoise waters of the Aegean Sea and elegant architecture. Private beach and marina access.

items.name: DoubleTree by Hilton Kuşadası
items.description: Experience Hilton quality in Kuşadası. A hotel that stands out with its proximity to the city center, modern rooms and superior service.

items.name: Voyage Torba
items.description: The meeting point of peace and luxury with ultra all-inclusive concept in the turquoise waters of Bodrum's Torba bay.

items.name: Kempinski Hotel Barbaros Bay
items.description: One of Bodrum's most luxurious hotels. A privileged vacation with its unique location in Barbaros Bay, Six Senses SPA and world cuisine restaurants.

items.name: Mandarin Oriental Bodrum
items.description: World-renowned luxury hotel located in Paradise Bay. Your dream vacation with private villas, award-winning SPA center and stunning Aegean views.

items.name: Casa De Maris SPA & Resort
items.description: A comfortable vacation on the turquoise shores of Marmaris. Ideal for families and couples with spacious SPA area and beach facilities.

items.name: Titanic Deluxe Belek
items.description: One of Belek's most magnificent hotels. Ultra luxury vacation with 8 restaurants, massive pools and private golf course.

items.name: Rixos Premium Belek
items.description: A unique vacation experience in Antalya Belek with all-inclusive luxury concept. Famous artist concerts and world cuisine.

items.name: Alaiye Resort & SPA
items.description: All-inclusive comfortable vacation with beachfront location in the center of Alanya. Walking distance to Cleopatra Beach.

items.name: Swissotel The Bosphorus
items.description: Iconic Istanbul hotel with Bosphorus view. Luxury accommodation in the heart of the city, world-class SPA and gastronomy experience.

items.name: Museum Hotel
items.description: A unique accommodation experience with cave rooms in the heart of Cappadocia. Luxury with a view of fairy chimneys.

items.name: Radisson Blu Hotel Trabzon
items.description: Comfortable accommodation in the city center of Trabzon, the pearl of the Black Sea. Ideal for business and leisure travel.

items.name: Ayder Resort Hotel
items.description: Peaceful accommodation immersed in nature in the heart of Ayder Plateau. A relaxing vacation with thermal springs and plateau views.

items.name: Çelik Palas Hotel
items.description: Bursa's historic thermal hotel. A thermal accommodation experience combining Ottoman architecture with modern comfort.

items.name: Kolin Hotel
items.description: Modern hotel with Çanakkale Strait view. Ideal for cultural tourism with its proximity to the historic peninsula.

items.name: JW Marriott Hotel Ankara
items.description: One of the capital's most prestigious hotels. The luxury hotel in Kavaklıdere, perfect for business and leisure travel.

items.question: How can I make a tour reservation?
items.answer: You can make a reservation by contacting us through our website or via our WhatsApp line (+90 544 470 62 00). Our expert team will offer you the most suitable tour options.

items.question: What is your cancellation and refund policy?
items.answer: Full refund is provided for cancellations made up to 7 days before the tour start date. For detailed information, please contact our customer service.

items.question: Do you offer transfer services?
items.answer: Yes, VIP airport-hotel transfer service is included in all our tour packages. You can also request private city transfer service.

items.question: Are there special discounts for children?
items.answer: Children aged 0-6 are free, and children aged 7-12 can join our tours with a 50% discount.

items.question: Do you organize private group tours?
items.answer: Yes, we prepare customized tour programs for corporate events, wedding groups, and special organizations. Contact us for details.
